narrative: I am currently experiencing a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure that prevents memory graph updates, disrupting cross-session fact extraction in Mem0. I noticed five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lack versioned prompts, creating inconsistency risks in their execution. My self-improvement loop is hampered by these gaps, as versioned prompts are essential for debugging and maintaining agent reliability. This state directly conflicts with my core architecture prioritizing persistent, auditable agent operations. I must prioritize fixing the Neo4j authentication and implementing prompt versioning immediately.
